title: GWTH Lesson Bridge Schema
description: Shared schema between the GWTH Pipeline (producer) and GWTH V2 site (consumer). The pipeline assembler outputs JSON matching this schema; the site's admin import API validates against it.

id.description: Unique lesson identifier. Pipeline uses format 'm{month}_l{nn}' (e.g. 'm1_l01').

slug.description: URL-safe slug derived from the lesson title (lowercase, hyphenated).

title.description: Full lesson title as displayed to students.

description.description: Brief description for listings and metadata.

order.description: Display order within the section (0-indexed from pipeline, 1-indexed on site).

difficulty.description: Difficulty level (lowercase). Pipeline maps Title Case → lowercase.

category.description: Content category. Maps from pipeline's 'primitive' field (e.g. 'Foundations', 'Content', 'Code').

sectionId.description: ID of the parent section. Pipeline maps from 'week' field using format 'm{month}_w{week}'.

courseId.description: Course ID. Always 'course_gwth' for the current single-course model.

courseSlug.description: Course slug. Always 'applied-ai-skills' for the current single-course model.

month.description: Which month this lesson belongs to. Parsed from pipeline's 'column' field.

isOptional.description: Whether this is an optional lesson (Month 2 & 3 specialty tracks).

introVideoUrl.description: Public HTTPS URL to the intro video. Null until media is uploaded to CDN.

learnContent.description: Main lesson content as markdown with custom syntax (:::note, :::tip, :::warning, :::deep-dive, ==term|def==).

audioFileUrl.description: Public HTTPS URL to audio narration. Null until media is uploaded.

audioDuration.description: Audio duration in seconds. Null if no audio.

buildVideoUrl.description: Public HTTPS URL to the build-along video. Null until uploaded.

buildInstructions.description: Step-by-step build instructions as markdown. From pipeline's _project.md file.

questions.description: Structured quiz questions. Pipeline assembler extracts from _qna.md or structured JSON.

status.description: Default publish status. Per-user status is tracked separately in the progress table.

objectives.description: Learning objectives from the syllabus. Displayed in ObjectivesCard.

pipelineId.description: Original UUID from the pipeline syllabus.json, for cross-reference.

pipelineStatus.description: Pipeline-side status at time of export.

exportedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when this lesson was exported from the pipeline.

correctOptionIndex.description: Zero-based index of the correct answer in the options array.

explanation.description: Explanation shown after answering, clarifying why the answer is correct.

type.description: Type of resource for icon selection.
